title: Senior Doctor - Apollo Hospitals - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Apollo Hospitals - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals:
Apollo Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
